name: League of Legends Patch Notes Breakdown
snippet:
Welcome to our patch notes breakdown for League of Legends Season 26.09 (Split 2)! Let's break down all the new changes in LoL coming this week.
Here are all the latest changes to League of Legends in this Mobalytics Patch Notes Breakdown.

name: League of Legends Patch 26.9 Notes
snippet:
2 days ago — In this patch we've got updates to champions, items, systems, and runes galore . Including bringing back some old favorites like Deathfire Touch ...
It's time to hunt demons with Patch 26.9! In this patch we've got updates to champions, items, systems, and runes galore. Including bringing back some old favorites like Deathfire Touch and Stormraider's Surge, and giving you a lot of new options to experiment with like new starting items and a variety of alternate champion builds.

name: League of Legends Upcoming PBE Patch Preview (26.09)
snippet: Apr 21, 2026 — Looking for the buffs, nerfs, and other changes coming up for the next patch of LoL? Here's our League of Legends patch preview !
